task_description: Write a customer response email to a customer who experienced data loss due to a bug in a recent product update.

input_data.issue: A bug in version 4.2.1 caused the customer's saved dashboard configurations (12 custom dashboards built over 6 months) to be deleted during the automatic update. The data cannot be recovered from the application but may be partially available from backups.
input_data.previous_interactions: Emergency ticket filed 2 hours ago. Customer is requesting compensation and a guarantee this will not happen again.

should_include: Technical explanation of what went wrong
